title: Cannot copy bound subquery node
description:
### What happens?

DuckDB triggers an INTERNAL Error "Cannot copy bound subquery node" when executing a complex nested query with `OFFSET EXISTS`, window functions with `PARTITION BY`, and correlated subqueries.

### To Reproduce

```sql
CREATE TABLE v00 AS SELECT 'string';
SELECT DISTINCT 'string', OFFSET EXISTS ( SELECT EXISTS ( FROM VALUES ( 'string' ) ta210498501 ( ta210498502 ) WHERE EXISTS ( FROM v00 WHERE format_type ( 0, 0 ) OVER ( PARTITION BY c01 IN ( SELECT 'string' ) ) ) ) );
```

key_bug_features: Executing complex nested query with OFFSET EXISTS and window functions
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR, value FLOAT, created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO test_table (id, name, value) VALUES (1, 'test1', 10.5), (2, 'test2', NULL), (3, 'test3', 20.0);
SELECT DISTINCT name, OFFSET EXISTS (SELECT EXISTS (SELECT * FROM test_table WHERE value IS NOT NULL AND created_at > '2023-01-01')) FROM test_table;
CREATE TABLE nested_table (ref_id INTEGER, description TEXT);
